name: react-photo-album-masonry
title: React Photo Album Masonry
author: Igor Danchenko
description: Places responsive photos into the current shortest column for a compact masonry flow.

files.content: export { default } from "./MasonryPhotoAlbum";
export { default } from "./masonry";

@import "modules/common.css";
@import "modules/masonry.css";

export { default as useArray } from "./useArray";
export { default as useContainerWidth } from "./useContainerWidth";

export * from "./StaticPhotoAlbum";
export { default } from "./StaticPhotoAlbum";

changes: Added a local render-component type bridge for React 19 polymorphic JSX without changing runtime behavior.

modifications.change: Added a local render-component type bridge for React 19 polymorphic JSX without changing runtime behavior.
modifications.reason: Keep the original polymorphic API while compiling the upstream React 18-era generic JSX against React 19 types.
